title: Saber 2
content:
{{Top|ga|leg|}} {{Otheruses|Saber}} {{IndividualShip |image=[[File:Saber2-CCGDS2.jpg]] |name=Saber 2 |designer= |manufacturer=[[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]]{{DB|starship|tieinterceptor|TIE interceptor}} states that all [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]] were manufactured by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]]. |line=[[TIE series/Legends|TIE Series]]{{CCG|set=Death Star II Limited|cardname=Saber 2}} |model=[[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptor]]{{CSWECite|III|23|Phennir, Turr}} |type=[[Starfighter/Legends|Starfighter]] |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew=[[TIE pilot]] |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role=[[Interceptor/Legends|Interceptor]] |commission= |destroyed= |retired= |battles=[[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |navy=[[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] |fleet=[[181st Imperial Fighter Wing/Legends|181st Imperial Fighter Wing]] |owners= |captains= |crewmembers=[[Turr Phennir]] |registry= |aliases= }} '''Saber 2,''' which was also designated '''Saber Two''', was an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptor]] manufactured by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] serving in the [[181st Imperial Fighter Wing/Legends|181st Imperial Fighter Wing's]] [[Saber Squadron (Imperial)/Legends|Saber Squadron]] by [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. [[Pilot/Legends|Piloted]] by the 181st's [[Executive officer/Legends|executive officer]] [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Turr Phennir]] in that [[Standard year/Legends|year]], Saber 2 participated in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which ended with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] destroying the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]], although Phennir himself managed to survive. ==Description== Saber 2, also designated as Saber Two, was an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptor]], manufactured by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]]. Saber 2's [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]] featured the standard wheel and yoke control system for [[TIE pilot]]s.{{CCG|set=Death Star II Limited|cardname=Major Turr Phennir}} ==History== {{Quote|Split up and head back to the surface. And see if you can get a few of those TIE fighters to follow you.''"
"''Copy, Gold Leader.|Green Four, Jake Farrell, acknowledges Gold Leader Lando Calrissian's order to draw off Saber 2 and other pursuing Imperial starfighters|{{Film|VI}}}} [[File:TurrPhennirinROTJ.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Turr Phennir flying Saber 2]] Saber 2 was assigned to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[181st Imperial Fighter Wing/Legends|181st Imperial Fighter Wing's]] [[Saber Squadron (Imperial)/Legends|Saber Squadron]] by [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. By that [[Standard year/Legends|year]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' Saber 2 was flown by [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Turr Phennir]], an [[Executive officer/Legends|executive officer]] of the 181st. In 4 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]], the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] occurred, during which the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] attacked the Imperial [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]]. Saber 2 participated in the battle, where it was responsible for Saber Squadron's logistics along with protecting the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Avenger/Legends|''Avenger'']]. The 181st was also tasked with protecting the ''Imperial II''-class [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] and the [[Battlecruiser/Legends|battlecruiser]] [[Pride of Tarlandia/Legends|''Pride of Tarlandia'']] during the battle, although the latter [[Starship/Legends|starship]] was destroyed.''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' As Alliance [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] entered the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] to destroy its [[Reactor/Legends|reactor core]], Phennir was among the [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] who pursued the Alliance starfighters within the Death Star. The Alliance's [[Gold Leader/Legends|Gold Leader]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], ordered his fellow [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilots]] to split off and head back to the Death Star's surface to draw away some of the pursuing Imperial starfighters. Saber 2 was one of the Imperial starfighters that pursued [[Jake Farrell/Legends|Jake Farrell]]{{SW|url=news/death-star-ii-personnel-and-imperial-human-resources|text=Death Star II Personnel: An Imperial Human Resources Guide|nolive=1}} and other Rebel pilots away from Calrissian, who successfully destroyed the reactor core, leading to the subsequent destruction of the Death Star itself. Phennir managed to escape the Death Star's destruction and survive the battle. ==Behind the scenes== [[File:Return_of_Jedi_Death_Star_fighters.png|thumb|right|250px|Saber 2 was retconned to be one of the TIE/IN interceptors seen in ''Return of the Jedi''.]] The Saber 2 name was introduced on a card in [[2000]]'s ''[[Death Star II Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Decipher]] [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]], simultaneously also being included on Turr Phennir's card within the same set. While Phennir's card shows an image of a TIE pilot from the [[1983]] [[original trilogy]] film, [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], that pilot is seen flying a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] and not a TIE/IN [[Interceptor/Legends|interceptor]]. Therefore, the pilot and starfighter must be separate subjects from Turr Phennir and Saber 2, as the latter was established to be an interceptor in its own card. Furthermore, neither of the cards link Saber 2 to any of the TIE/IN interceptors seen in ''Return of the Jedi''. The image used on the Saber 2 card is similar to another TIE/IN interceptor image seen in the "Fighter Cover" card within the same set.{{CCG|set=Death Star II Limited|cardname=Fighter Cover}} Saber 2 was also mentioned in Phennir's entry in the [[2008]] ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', where it was given the alternate designation of Saber Two. On [[June 5]], [[2015]], [[Tim Veekhoven]] wrote the article "[[Death Star II Personnel: An Imperial Human Resources Guide]]" for [[StarWars.com]], which [[Retroactive continuity|retconned]] Saber 2 as one of the TIE/IN interceptors from ''Return of the Jedi'', although erroneously representing Phennir with an image of the TIE pilot from ''Return of the Jedi'' whom the ''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game previously identified him as. This article treats the ''Return of the Jedi'' TIE/LN starfighter pilot used by the ''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game and "Death Star II Personnel: An Imperial Human Resources Guide" as [[in-universe]] depictions of Phennir flying Saber 2. ==Appearances== *{{Film|VI}} {{1st}} {{Ret}} *[[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi (junior novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'' junior novelization]] {{Ret}} ==Sources== *''[[The Art of Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi]]'' {{Imo}} {{Ret}} *''[[Star Wars: The Annotated Screenplays]]'' {{Imo}} {{Ret}} *''[[Star Wars: Behind the Magic]]'' {{Imo}} {{Ret}} {{CardGameSet|set={{CCG|set=Death Star II Limited|parent=1}}|cards= *{{CCG|set=Death Star II Limited|cardname=Major Turr Phennir}} {{C|First mentioned before [[Retroactive continuity|retcon]], simultaneous with {{CCG|set=Death Star II Limited|cardname=Saber 2}}}} *{{CCG|set=Death Star II Limited|cardname=Saber 2}} }} *{{FactFile|34|IMP 5-8|Imperial Troops}} {{Po}} {{Ret}} *{{CSWECite|III||Phennir, Turr}} {{1stID|Saber Two}} *{{SW|url=news/death-star-ii-personnel-and-imperial-human-resources|text=Death Star II Personnel: An Imperial Human Resources Guide|nolive=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Saber 2}} {{Reflist}} [[Category:Starships of Death Squadron]] [[Category:TIE/IN interceptors]]
